description.en: Adventurer Bell Cranell's life changed forever when he met the goddess Hestia, becoming the first member of her familia. Since then, he’s gone on many adventures, growing much stronger in the process. But when he steps foot into Orario’s pleasure quarter, where Ishtar Familia reigns supreme, he soon finds himself in way over his head... With enemies all around him, he’ll need the help of a beautiful, fox-eared courtesan if he’s to have any hope of making it back home!
description.ru: Огромный город Орарио - всего лишь вход в подземный лабиринт, широко известный как "Подземелье". Люди приходят туда за славой, честью, приходят, надеясь получить все то, что захотят. И именно здесь парень, мечтающий стать авантюристом, знакомится с маленькой богиней, не нашедшей ни одного последователя. Продолжение "Может, я встречу тебя в подземелье?" от Оомори Фуджино с новым художником Ямачи Тайсей.

description.en:
"Uh…Freya-sama left a letter and has left…"  
  
The members of the Freya Familia all turned at once to look at the messenger. Leaving the shocked first class adventurers aside, the uninhibited Goddess of Beauty leaves on a journey to fulfill her desire!
description.ru:
«Эээ … Фрейя-сама оставила письмо и ушла …»   
  
Члены Семьи Фрейи сразу повернулись, чтобы посмотреть на посланника. Оставив в стороне потрясенных первоклассных авантюристов, раскованная Богиня красоты отправляется в путешествие, чтобы исполнить свое желание!

description.en: This is the Labyrinth City Orario. It possesses the only underground labyrinth in the whole lower world, and thus has prospered from it, coming to be known as the "Center of the World." Ryuu Lion, under the owner Mia Grand, worked daily at the pub Hostess of Fertility alongside her coworkers Syr Flova, Arnya Fromel, Chloe Rollo, and Lunoire Faust. One day, a pair of Humans' voices shatters the peace of the store… This is a fairy tale that won't be written down, the Story of Lion!
description.ru: Это город-лабиринт Орарио. Он обладает единственным в целом нижнем мире подземным лабиринтом и, таким образом, процветает, становясь известным, как "Центр Мира". Рю Лайон ежедневно работала в пабе Мии Гранд "Хозяйка плодородия" вместе с Сил Фловер, Аней Фломер, Хлор Лоло и Руноа Фауст. Однажды, пара человеческих голосов нарушила спокойствие в пабе. Это сказка, что никогда не будет списана со счетов, история Лайон
description.pt-br: Esta é a cidade labiríntica de Orario. Ela possui o único labirinto subterrâneo em todo o mundo inferior, e por isso tem prosperado, vindo a ser conhecida como o "Centro do Mundo". Lyu Leon, sob a proprietária Mia Grand, trabalha diariamente no bar Hostess of Fertility ao lado de suas colegas Syr Flova, Ahnya Fromel, Chloe Rollo e Lunoire Faust. Um dia, vozes de humanos destroem a paz da loja... Esta é uma fábula que não será escrita, a história de Leon!

description.en:
Bell Cranel is just trying to find his way in the world. Of course, in his case, the “world” is an enormous dungeon filled with monsters below a city run by gods and goddesses with way too much time on their hands. He’s got big dreams but not much more when a roll on the random encounter die brings him face-to-face with the girl of his dreams—but what’s an amateur adventurer got to offer a brilliant swords woman? And what if the lonely goddess who sponsors his solo adventuring gets jealous?  
  
[See AnimeNewsNetwork for the anime.](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=16443)

description.en:
After having descended upon this world, the gods have created guilds where adventurers can test their mettle. These guilds, known as "familia," grant adventurers the chance to explore, gather, hunt, or simply enjoy themselves.

Dungeon ni Deai wo Motomeru no wa Machigatteiru Darou ka Gaiden: Sword Oratoria begins in Orario, the lively city of adventurers. The Sword Princess, Ais Wallenstein, and the novice mage, Lefiya Viridis, are members of the Loki Familia, who are experts at monster hunting. With the rest of their group, they journey to the tower of Babel in hopes of exploring the dungeon underneath. Home to powerful monsters, the dungeon will fulfill Ais's desire to master her sword skills, while bringing Lefiya closer to her dream of succeeding Riveria Ljos Alf, vice-captain of the Loki Familia, as the most powerful mage in the land.
description.ja: アイズ･ヴァレンシュタインは＜剣姫＞として名高く、第一級冒険者の中でも最強の一角といわれている。そんなアイズでも、まだまだ強くなりたいと思っている様子…？果たしてそれはなぜ…？
description.ru: Спин-офф ранобэ "Может, я встречу тебя в подземелье", который охватывает историю одной из сильнейших авантюристок по имени Аиз Валленштайн, также известной, как "Принцесса Меча".

description.en:
Bell Cranel is just trying to find his way in the world. Of course, in his case, the “world” is an enormous dungeon filled with monsters below a city run by gods and goddesses with way too much time on their hands. He’s got big dreams but not much more when a roll on the random encounter die brings him face-to-face with the girl of his dreams—but what’s an amateur adventurer got to offer a brilliant swords woman? And what if the lonely goddess who sponsors his solo adventuring gets jealous?

(Series was cancelled in 2018 for an unknown reason and restarted in 2020 under a sequel title.)
